language.title: Choose Your Language
language.sub: Select your preferred language to continue
language.hint: You can change this anytime using the language button on the home screen.

patient.title: Welcome Back
patient.sub: Sign in to your patient account
patient.idHint: Your patient ID is on your registration card
patient.error: Invalid Patient ID. Please check and try again.
patient.newNote: New patient? Ask your nurse to register you.

caretaker.title: Caretaker Sign In
caretaker.sub: Sign in to monitor your patient
caretaker.idHint: The patient ID of the person you care for
caretaker.phoneHint: The phone number registered with the hospital
caretaker.error: Details not found. Please contact the hospital.
caretaker.newNote: Not registered as a caretaker? Ask the hospital staff to add you.

setup.reminderQuestion: When would you like your daily health reminder?
setup.notifSub: Important for your care. We will remind you to check in daily.
setup.hint: You can update these preferences anytime using the Settings icon on the home screen.
setup.hintSettings: Your changes will be saved when you tap Save Settings.
setup.step1Sub: Set the time for your daily health reminder
setup.step2Sub: Allow NeuroSight to send you health reminders
setup.reminderHint: We'll remind you to complete your daily check-in at this time.
setup.notifFullText: Allow notifications so we can remind you about your daily check-in and any important updates from your care team.

chat.title: Care Assistant
chat.subtitle: NeuroSight AI
chat.quick2: What are my treatment side effects?
chat.quick3: When should I go to hospital?
chat.welcome: Hello {{name}}! I am your NeuroSight care assistant. You can ask me about your condition, treatment side effects, what to eat, or when to visit the hospital.
chat.clearWelcome: Hello {{name}}! Ask me anything about your health.
chat.disclaimer: Answers are based on your medical record. Always confirm with your doctor.
chat.errorSend: Could not send. Please check your connection and try again.
chat.urgentNotice: An urgent message was received. See below.

home.setupBannerSub: Enable reminders & notifications for better care
home.setupSkippedSub: Default check-in reminder: {{time}}, tap to customise
home.noCheckin: No check-in yet. Tap Daily Check-in to start.
home.medicationSub: Track your daily medications, never miss a dose

medReminder.title: Medication Reminder
medReminder.noMedsSub: Your doctor will add your medications to your care plan
medReminder.noPlansHint: No care plans are on record for your account yet. Ask your care team to create one.
medReminder.noMedInPlans: You have care plans on record, but none include medication details yet. Ask your doctor to add your medications.
medReminder.footNote: These medications are prescribed by your care team. Contact your doctor for any changes.

report.title: My Report
report.noScanSub: Your MRI results will appear here once your doctor uploads them.
report.footerNote: This report is prepared by your medical team. Discuss any questions with your doctor or nurse.

symptom.title: Report a New Symptom
symptom.subtitle: Noticed something unusual? Let your care team know
symptom.purposeText: Use this page to report any new or irregular symptom you have noticed that is not an emergency. Your doctor will review it.
symptom.hintEmergency: Having a seizure, severe headache, or other urgent problem? Use the Emergency SOS button instead.
symptom.hintCheckin: For your regular daily symptoms (headache, energy, sleep), use the Daily Check-in.
symptom.describePlaceholder: When did you first notice it? How does it feel? Any other details…
symptom.describeHint: Even a short description helps your doctor understand the symptom better.
symptom.successMsg: Your care team has received your report and will review it at the next available opportunity.
symptom.errorSend: Unable to send the report. Please check your connection and try again.

education.title: About My Condition
education.seekHelpUrgent: Go to hospital right away if you experience:
education.generalNote: Always discuss questions about your health with your doctor or care team. This information is for general guidance only.
